PROJECT OVERVIEW:
The project focuses on developing an application with key requirements including performance, usability, timely delivery, and robustness. The application must handle user requests quickly, have an intuitive interface, and be compatible with Android 8.1 and later versions. Additionally, the project must use Firebase as the database and ensure timely delivery of deliverables.

Title: User can create an account during first app launch
Preconditions: Application must be downloaded from the store and installed correctly on the mobile device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time.
2. Follow the prompts to create a new user account.
3. Enter required details such as username, email, and password.
4. Confirm account creation.
Expected Result: The user will be able to navigate within the application after registration.

Title: User can view their profile
Preconditions: User must be registered, have logged into the application, and have an active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Log into the application.
2. Navigate to the profile section.
3. Verify that the profile displays the user's name, email, and password.
Expected Result: The user can view their profile information and navigate through various profile sections.

Title: User can edit their profile
Preconditions: User must be registered, have logged into the application, and have an active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Log into the application.
2. Navigate to the profile section.
3. Edit the user's name, email, and password.
4. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The user can view their updated profile information.

Title: Registered user can log in
Preconditions: Application must be installed and user must be registered.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Enter the registered username and password.
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: The user will be authenticated and redirected to the main screen where they can access all features and services.

Title: User can log out
Preconditions: User must be logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Log into the application.
2. Navigate to the logout option.
3. Confirm logout.
Expected Result: The user will no longer be connected to the application.

Title: User can analyze plants
Preconditions: User must be logged into the application and have a functioning camera on their phone.
Test Steps:
1. Log into the application.
2. Use the camera feature to take a picture of a plant.
3. Analyze the plant using the application.
Expected Result: The user will receive detailed information about the plant and its care.

Title: User can add a planted plant
Preconditions: User must be logged into the application and have taken a picture of a planted plant.
Test Steps:
1. Log into the application.
2. Add the planted plant to the user's profile.
Expected Result: The user will build a personalized database of their planted plants.

Title: User can detect plant diseases
Preconditions: User must be logged into the application, have taken a picture of a plant, and have an active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Log into the application.
2. Take a picture of a plant suspected to have a disease.
3. Use the application to detect the disease.
Expected Result: The user will receive advice and necessary information to care for the plant.

Title: User can maintain a personal diary of their plants
Preconditions: User must be logged into the application and have taken a picture of a planted plant.
Test Steps:
1. Log into the application.
2. Take a picture of a planted plant.
3. View the plant in the personal diary.
Expected Result: Each plant in the diary will be displayed with its name and planting date. <|end|>

Title: Verify Firebase is used as the primary database
Test Steps:
1. Install and launch the application on a device meeting the minimum system requirements.
2. Check the application settings or logs for confirmation that Firebase is being used as the primary database.
Expected Result: The application should confirm that Firebase is being used as the primary database.

Title: Verify minimum device requirements are met
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device with Android 8.1 (API 27) or higher, at least 1 GB of RAM, and at least 300 MB of free storage.
2. Launch the application and check for any error messages or prompts indicating that the device does not meet the minimum requirements.
Expected Result: The application should run without errors and prompt the user to upgrade their device if necessary.

Title: Verify application requires stable internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Install and launch the application on a device with a stable internet connection.
2. Attempt to perform a basic function within the application (e.g., adding a plant).
3. Switch to a network with poor or no internet connection and attempt the same function.
Expected Result: The application should fail to perform the function when there is no stable internet connection and display an appropriate error message.

Title: Verify application enforces responsible usage
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to upload a photo that is not related to plants.
2. Observe the application’s response to the uploaded photo.
Expected Result: The application should prevent the upload of photos not related to plants and display a warning message to the user.
